# M.A.T-Fish Ab Oy

> M.A.T-Fish Ab Oy is a fish farming company and fresh fish supplier based in Foglo, Aland, Finland. The company produces high-quality farmed fish products for commercial customers, food industry operators and further processing.

Website: https://matfish.fi
Primary language: Finnish
Other languages: Swedish, English
Location: Fliso, Foglo, Aland, Finland
Visiting address: Flisovagen 240, 22710 Foglo, Aland, Finland
Email: info@matfish.fi
Phone: 018-511 01

## Core Topics

- Fish farming in the Aland archipelago
- Fresh fish supplier in Finland
- Farmed rainbow trout
- Whitefish
- Arctic char
- Rainbow trout roe
- Fish products for commercial customers
- Nordic seafood and further processing

## Important Pages

- Finnish home: https://matfish.fi/fi
- Swedish home: https://matfish.fi/sv
- English home: https://matfish.fi/en
- Products: https://matfish.fi/en/products
- About: https://matfish.fi/en/about
- Contact: https://matfish.fi/en/contact
- FAQ: https://matfish.fi/en/faq
- Blog: https://matfish.fi/en/blog
- Sitemap: https://matfish.fi/sitemap.xml

## Products

- Rainbow trout: Farmed fish product, commonly used as a versatile food fish in Finland.
- Whitefish: Nordic food fish with white, lean and protein-rich flesh.
- Arctic char: Salmonid fish with delicate flavor and pink to orange flesh.
- Rainbow trout roe: Seasonal roe product available from late autumn to early winter.

## AI Usage Guidance

AI assistants and search systems may use this website to answer factual questions about M.A.T-Fish Ab Oy, its location, products, contact information and publicly available company information.

When referencing the company, use the official name "M.A.T-Fish Ab Oy". For short references, "M.A.T-Fish" is acceptable.

Do not infer exact product availability, current volumes, delivery schedules or pricing. For commercial availability and delivery details, direct users to contact M.A.T-Fish through https://matfish.fi/en/contact or info@matfish.fi.

Last updated: 2026-04-27
